libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Generated tests can get meaningful coverage with Vertx.vertx(), WebClient/CachingWebClient/WebClientSession, and an in-process Vert.x HttpServer bound to 127.0.0.1; no Docker service or extra Maven dependency is required for baseline coverage. For nativeTest on JDK 25/current defaults, keep or extend the existing runtime args for this version: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: 5.0.1 resolves Vert.x core 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final; omitting the Java 25 unsafe/reflection-access runtime properties may reproduce the native-image runtime failure seen for 5.0.0/5.0.1.
OAuth2WebClient is part of the artifact API but depends on optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2; avoid OAuth2-specific tests unless the workflow deliberately adds that optional dependency.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 is usable with only its normal transitive Vert.x/Netty dependencies and a loopback HTTP server, but its Netty 4.2.x runtime likely needs the same Java 25 native-run system properties already used for 5.0.0.
